2606.14150.title: Small LLMs: Pruning vs. Training from Scratch
2606.14150.paper_summary: Pruning promises a shortcut to strong small language models. In this work, we examine this promise by pruning Llama-3.1-8B at pruning ratios of 0.5--0.8 with six methods spanning depth, width, and sparse granularities, under two controlled token-matched settings. (1) With the same training token budget, pruned initialization consistently outperforms random initialization. This shows that the parent model provides a strong starting point, although the advantage narrows as the training token budget grows and as the pruning ratio rises, nearly vanishing at the highest pruning ratio we study. (2) When training from scratch is instead given the full token budget consumed by the whole pipeline, pruning at finer granularities still retains an advantage, while coarser structured pruning can be matched or surpassed. This suggests that the parent model transfers knowledge that additional training tokens alone cannot fully recover, but only at fine granularity. Taken together, our results yield a clear recommendation: with a large pretrained model in hand and a limited training token budget, pruning is better than training from scratch; when the training budget is not limited, training from scratch can be competitive for coarser pruning, so a large pretrained parent is not always necessary.
2606.14150.paper_summary_zh: 修剪為強大的小型語言模型提供了一條捷徑。在這項工作中，我們通過以0.5至0.8的修剪比率修剪Llama-3.1-8B，並在兩個受控的標記匹配設置下，檢驗這一承諾，使用了六種涵蓋深度、寬度和稀疏粒度的方法。<lb/>（1）在相同的訓練標記預算下，修剪初始化始終優於隨機初始化。這顯示出母模型提供了一個強有力的起點，儘管隨著訓練標記預算的增長和修剪比率的上升，這一優勢會縮小，並在我們研究的最高修剪比率下幾乎消失。<lb/>（2）當從頭開始訓練時，則給予整個流程消耗的完整標記預算，修剪在更細的粒度下仍然保持優勢，而粗糙的結構化修剪可以被匹配或超越。這表明母模型轉移的知識是額外的訓練標記無法完全恢復的，但僅在細粒度下才能實現。<lb/>綜合來看，我們的結果提供了一個明確的建議：在手中擁有一個大型預訓練模型並且訓練標記預算有限的情況下，修剪比從頭開始訓練更好；當訓練預算不受限制時，從頭開始訓練在粗糙修剪上可以具有競爭力，因此大型預訓練母模型並不總是必要的。
2606.14150.author: Yufeng Xu et.al.
2606.14150.authors: Yufeng Xu, Taiming Lu, Kunjun Li, Jiachen Zhu, Mingjie Sun, Zhuang Liu
